title: Specify codex rule frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block at the top of a codex rule markdown file. The schema applies only to the machine-readable frontmatter between the opening and closing `---` delimiters; Markdown body validation, including the required `## Rule` heading and duplicate-id checks across a resolved rule set, is handled by the codex parser and resolver.

id.description: Stable codex rule identifier. V1 reserves UNI, RUST, IFACE, SEC, OMNIA, VECTIS, and ORG namespaces with three-digit numeric suffixes.

severity.description: Default review severity for findings associated with this rule.

trigger.description: One-sentence condition that tells a generator or reviewer when the rule matters.
